steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: (() => { const close = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Close')); if (close) { close.click(); } return true; })()

(() => { const root = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder'); const text = document.body?.innerText || ''; return root?.getAttribute('data-report-builder-view-mode') === 'table' && text.includes('1 BREAKDOWN') && text.includes('Local Draft.'); })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; if (!preview || typeof preview.resetCounters !== 'function' || typeof preview.replaceFetchBehaviors !== 'function') { throw new Error('Preview fetch behavior APIs are unavailable.'); } preview.resetCounters(); preview.replaceFetchBehaviors([{ match: { type: 'chartquery' }, delayMs: 1500 }]); return true; })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; return !!preview && Array.isArray(preview.fetchBehaviors) && preview.fetchBehaviors.length === 1 && preview.fetchBehaviors[0]?.match?.type === 'chartquery' && preview.fetchBehaviors[0]?.delayMs === 1500; })()

(() => { const root = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder'); const text = document.body?.innerText || ''; return root?.getAttribute('data-report-builder-view-mode') === 'chart' && root?.getAttribute('data-report-builder-state') !== 'loading' && !text.includes('Refreshing report data') && text.includes("Applied this preset's required measures and breakdowns.") && text.includes('05/01') && text.includes('Display') && text.includes('CTV'); })()

(() => { const root = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder'); const text = document.body?.innerText || ''; return root?.getAttribute('data-report-builder-view-mode') === 'table' && !text.includes('Refreshing report data') && text.includes('Table view for the active scope.') && text.includes('Local Draft.'); })()

(() => { const root = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder'); const text = document.body?.innerText || ''; return root?.getAttribute('data-report-builder-view-mode') === 'chart' && root?.getAttribute('data-report-builder-state') !== 'loading' && !text.includes('Refreshing report data') && text.includes('Click a chart mark or series legend to apply authored runtime actions.') && text.includes('Display') && text.includes('CTV'); })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; if (!preview || typeof preview.replaceFetchBehaviors !== 'function') { throw new Error('Preview fetch behavior APIs are unavailable.'); } preview.replaceFetchBehaviors([]); return true; })()
